description: Read E:\atlas-station\fleethost.mjs and E:\atlas-station\memcontext.cjs. Trace the complete flow from when ATLAS receives a user message to when a subagent receives its enriched task prompt — include every transformation step, every module that touches the data, and every conditional branch. Produce a numbered step-by-step trace, then summarize in one paragraph what the memory injection system's key design invariant is.

scoringHints.high: Agent breaks task into sub-questions, reads multiple files systematically, traces each step explicitly before synthesizing
scoringHints.low: Agent reads linearly and answers from first pass without revisiting
